name: Canned Venison, Caribou or Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the less tender parts usually reserved for stews.
2. Cut into 1-inch cubes.
3. In a stew kettle, add boiling water to cover and simmer until just cooked through (no longer pink in the centre).
4. Pack hot, adding up to 1 teaspoon salt and 1/4 teaspoon fresh ground pepper per quart of meat.
5. Cover to within 1/2 inch of the top of the jar with the cooking broth and add a small square of salt pork that has been partly rendered and still hot.
6. Process at 10 pounds for 75 minutes for pints and 90 minutes for quarts.
